anatomy.description: The outer container. Full-width pill shape (366×64px). Carries the subtle background fill. Acts as the slide rail for the thumb.
The dark pill-shaped handle the user slides. 80×56px in the default state. Expands to fill the full inner width (358×56px) in the filled state. Contains the arrow icon.
A right-pointing arrow icon (Customer-Icon/right-forward) inside the thumb. 24×24px. Positioned at the trailing edge of the thumb in the filled state.
Text label centered over the track. Uses mix-blend-difference to remain readable over both the light track and dark thumb at any slide position.

states.name: default
states.description: Initial resting state. Thumb is at the start (left) of the track. Width: 80px. The action has not been triggered.

states.name: filled
states.description: Completed state. Thumb has expanded to fill the full inner width (358×56px). The action has been confirmed.

stateNote: Only two visual states are defined in Figma. Intermediate drag positions and disabled/focus states are not specified.

typography.note: Uses the headings font family (Google Sans Flex), not the body font (Manrope). mix-blend-difference ensures readability at all thumb positions.

usageContext: High-stakes, intentional actions that must not be triggered accidentally.
Confirmed from Driver App: used to go online as a driver.
Intended for single confirmations per screen — not for repeated use.
notes: No type variants — single visual style.
Only two states defined in Figma: default and filled. Intermediate drag states are not specified.
